title: Study session persistence
description: Add StudySession model, Hive storage, and repository date-range helpers for focus sessions.
acceptance_criteria: StudySession serializes/deserializes; Hive opens study_sessions; forLocalDay includes only sessions whose endedAt is on the requested local date; clearAll clears study_sessions.
review_initial_requirements: Review model fields, JSON parsing, local-day boundary logic, and Hive integration.
review_regression_requirements: Run repository tests and verify existing Hive service behavior is not broken.
notes: risk: local date boundaries must use device local date; picked_reason:first not_started P0 data foundation; red:first test run failed on missing StudySession/repository/Hive box; evidence:flutter test test/study_session_repository_test.dart passed 3/3; evidence:dart analyze passed no issues; done_at:2026-06-08; skills_used:mission-csv-execute,test-driven-development,verification-before-completion; mcp_used:shell_command; continue_now:FR-002

title: Study session providers and timer controller
description: Add Riverpod providers for session list, today summary, and focus timer state.
acceptance_criteria: Today summary reports count and total seconds only for today's ended sessions; finishing a positive-duration timer saves one session; reset does not save a session.
review_initial_requirements: Review provider refresh behavior, timer state transitions, and no-zero-duration save rule.
review_regression_requirements: Run provider tests plus related page tests after UI integration.
notes: risk: timer tests should avoid wall-clock flakiness; picked_reason:next P0 after FR-001 data foundation; red:first test run failed on missing study_session_provider.dart; red:pause/resume test exposed paused duration counted as elapsed; evidence:flutter test test/study_session_provider_test.dart passed 4/4; evidence:dart analyze passed no issues; done_at:2026-06-08; skills_used:mission-csv-execute,test-driven-development,verification-before-completion; mcp_used:shell_command; continue_now:FR-003

title: Bottom navigation and routes
description: Introduce bottom navigation shell with 首页, 院校, 记录, 设置 and add /record plus /study-records routes.
acceptance_criteria: Bottom bar shows exactly four top-level destinations; tapping 记录 opens focus timer page; tapping 院校 opens monitor page; monitor hit records remain under /monitor/:id/hits and are not a bottom tab.
review_initial_requirements: Review GoRouter shell structure, selected tab calculation, and preservation of existing detail routes.
review_regression_requirements: Run app router tests and existing monitor page tests.
notes: risk: existing tests that create minimal routers may need route updates; picked_reason:next P0 after FR-002 state foundation; red:app_router_test failed because NavigationDestination and 记录 tab were absent; evidence:flutter test test/app_router_test.dart passed 3/3; evidence:flutter test test/monitor_pages_test.dart passed 6/6; evidence:dart analyze passed no issues; done_at:2026-06-08; skills_used:mission-csv-execute,test-driven-development,verification-before-completion; mcp_used:shell_command; continue_now:FR-004

title: Focus timer record page
description: Build the 记录 main page with 45:00 timer, controls, today focus count, today total duration, and right-top learning-record entry.
acceptance_criteria: Record page displays 45:00 by default; stat labels are 今日专注次数 and 今日累计时长; start/pause/resume/finish/reset controls are present; right-top action navigates to /study-records.
review_initial_requirements: Review UI copy, timer control behavior, and that stats aggregate today only.
review_regression_requirements: Run record page widget tests and navigation tests.
notes: note: layout references provided image but excludes illustration beautification

title: Learning records page
description: Build 学习记录 page with 日/周/月/年 filters, summary card, simple bar distribution, and data table.
acceptance_criteria: The page filters persisted sessions by selected range; summary shows range total duration and focus count; table columns are 日期, 专注次数, 累计时长; empty state appears when no sessions exist.
review_initial_requirements: Review grouping logic, range boundaries, table readability, and no new chart dependency.
review_regression_requirements: Run study records widget tests and provider tests.
notes: risk: year view should stay simple for MVP

title: Full regression and handoff
description: Run full verification and update progress docs after implementation.
acceptance_criteria: dart analyze passes; flutter test passes; flutter build apk passes; docs/PROGRESS.md notes the new 记录 feature status; unrelated dirty files are not mixed into the commit.
review_initial_requirements: Review test output, build output, docs sync, and git diff scope.
review_regression_requirements: Run full analyze/test/build regression and inspect git status before commit.
notes: risk: existing home_widget Kotlin Gradle warning remains out of scope
